summary.zh: 编排多阶段关键帧、插值、步进与结束状态。
summary.en: Compose multi-stage keyframes, interpolation, stepped motion, and fill behavior.

definition.zh: 动画中预先定义的节点（如 0%、50%、100%），浏览器会补全节点之间的画面。
definition.en: Named timeline checkpoints assign property values at selected offsets; interpolation determines the states between them.

description.zh: 演示使用较长时长以便观察完整变化；生产界面的即时反馈应收敛到 300ms 内。
description.en: Uses a longer demo duration so the full change stays observable; immediate production UI feedback should stay under 300ms.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 定义多阶段状态、补间方式、步进节奏和动画结束后的样式。
purpose.en: Define multi-stage states, interpolation behavior, stepped rhythm, and post-animation styles.

frequency.zh: 适合低频、具有阶段含义的动作；简单反馈优先使用单段 transition。
frequency.en: Use for low-frequency motion with meaningful phases; simple feedback favors a single transition.

trigger.zh: 由明确状态变化或演示重播触发，每个关键帧承担可解释的阶段。
trigger.en: Trigger from an explicit state change or replay action, with each keyframe representing a meaningful phase.

enterExit.zh: 首帧对应进入前状态，末帧对应稳定状态；退出动画拥有独立且更短的时间线。
enterExit.en: Map the first frame to the pre-entry state and the last to the stable state; give exit its own shorter timeline.

interruptibility.zh: 中断后根据当前计算样式建立新时间线，避免强制跳到某个关键帧。
interruptibility.en: On interruption, build the next timeline from current computed styles instead of snapping to a keyframe.

gestureRules.zh: 时间线本身无需手势；交互式进度控制要支持指针、触摸和键盘。
gestureRules.en: The timeline itself needs no gesture; interactive progress controls support pointer, touch, and keyboard.

reducedMotion.zh: 缩短为一次状态切换，移除预备、回弹和重复阶段。
reducedMotion.en: Collapse to one state change and remove anticipation, overshoot, and repeated phases.

reviewNotes.zh: 逐帧核对各阶段是否服务于理解。
reviewNotes.en: Review whether every phase improves understanding.

reviewNotes.zh: 验证 fill-mode 不会留下不可交互的视觉状态。
reviewNotes.en: Verify that fill-mode never leaves an unusable visual state.
